title: LZTD-002 Loving All Day Long Endless Lesbian SEX Yui Hatano Runa Hanekawa
overview: Yui Hatano and Runa Hanekawa have always been interested in each other. Let these two enjoy a one-day rendezvous without a script. In a suite room at a hotel near the port prepared by the staff, you can make love as you like without worrying about time. The shooting that started in the early afternoon doesn't end when the night view starts to peek through the window...
